
======================================================================
LibreOffice 26.2 ReadMe
======================================================================


For the latest updates to this readme file, see https://git.libreoffice.org/core/tree/master/README.md

Afaylu agi yegber talɣut taxatart ɣef useɣẓan LibreOffice. Yelha limer ad teɣreḍ talɣut agi s wudem leqqayen send asebded.

Tadukli LibreOffice d nettat i d tamasayt ɣef tneflit n ufaris-a, yerna tessutur seg-k akken ad tettekkiḍ deg tdukli-a. Ma telliḍ d aseqdac amaynut, tzemreḍ ad terzuḍ ɣer usmel n LibreOffice, anda ara tafeḍ ddeqs n yisallen ɣef usenfaṛ LibreOffice akked d tdukliwin illan deffir-s. Ddu ɣer https://www.libreoffice.org/.

LibreOffice d ilelli i yal aseqdac?
----------------------------------------------------------------------

LibreOffice d ilelli i useqdec i yal yiwen. Tzemreḍ ad tesbeddeḍ LibreOffice di deqs n iselkimen, tzemreḍ ad tesqedceḍ i yal iswi tebɣiḍ (am useqdec deg tzenzit, anabḍan, tanedbelt tazayezt neɣ aseldem). I telɣut leqqyen tasemmadant wali aḍris n uselkin i d-yeddan akked d usider n LibreOffice.

Acuɣer  LibreOffice d ilelli i yal yiwen?
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Tzemred ad tesqedceḍ anɣel agi n LibreOffice baṭel acku imttekkiyen d wid d-yettmuddun tallalt s yedrimen feṣlen, sneflin, sekyeden, suqlen, uran tasemlit, mudden-d tallalt, meslayen ɣef ufaris, udiq mudden-d tallalt s deqs n tarrayin akken LibreOffice ad yili amek yella ass-a - d aseɣẓan n tiffurasa n uɣbalu yeldin ifazen i uxxam neɣ i umahil.

If you appreciate their efforts, and would like to ensure that LibreOffice continues to be available far into the future, please consider contributing to the project - see https://www.libreoffice.org/community/get-involved/ for details. Everyone can make a contribution of some kind.

----------------------------------------------------------------------
Tamawt ɣef usebded
----------------------------------------------------------------------

LibreOffice yesra lqem amaynut n Java Runtime Environment (JRE) akken ad yeddu imeṛṛa. JRE ur ittekki ara deg usebded n LibreOffice, yessek ad yettwasebded i yiman-is.

Israyen n unagraw
----------------------------------------------------------------------

* Microsoft Windows 10 or higher

Ma ulac aɣilif, yessefk ad teẓreḍ d akken tesriḍ izerfan n undbal i ukala n usebded.

Asekles n LibreOffice d asnas amezwer i yimasalen n Microsoft Office ad ittwasekmer neq ad ittwakkes s useqdec n izirig n tladna deg umsebdad:

* REGISTER_ALL_MSO_TYPES=1 ad isekmer asekles n LibreOffice d asnas amezwer i yimasalen Microsoft Office.
* REGISTER_NO_MSO_TYPES=1 ad yekkes asekles n LibreOffice d asnas amezwer i yimasalen Microsoft Office.

Tebbet ma yella ɣuṛ-k deqs n tkatut ɣef ukaram askudan udiɣ ɣur-k izerfan n tɣuri, tira d uselkem. Mdel akk iseɣzanen nniḍen send ad tebduḍ asebded.

Asebded n LibreOffice ɣef inagrawen Linux yebnan ɣef Debian/Ubuntu
----------------------------------------------------------------------

I tinaḍin n usebded n ukemmus utlayan (seld asebded n lqem n tutlayt Taglizit US n LibreOffice), Ɣaṛ ma ulac aɣilif, tigezmi daw agi yettusemman Sebded akemmus utlayan.

When you unpack the downloaded archive, you will see that the contents have been decompressed into a sub-directory. Open a file manager window, and change directory to the one starting with "LibreOffice_", followed by the version number and some platform information.

Akarm yegber akram nniḍen s yisem "DEBS".  Ddu ɣer ukaram "DEBS".

Sit s tqeffalt tayeffust deg ukaram sakin fren "Lditadiwent". Asfaylu n tdiwent ad-yeldi. Seg izirig n tladna n usfaylusekcem taladna yagi (Ak-d-yettusuter usekcem n wawal uffir inekl send aselkem n tladna) :

The following commands will install LibreOffice and the desktop integration packages (you may just copy and paste them into the terminal screen rather than trying to type them):

sudo dpkg -i *.deb

Akala n usebded yemmed yakan ihi tura yessefk ad twaliḍ tignitin n yesnasen iméṛṛan LibreOffice ɣef umuɣ Isnasenn twennaṭ n tnarit inek.

Asebded n LibreOffice ɣef inagrawen Linux yebnan ɣef Fedora, Mandriva neɣ inagrawen Linux nniḍen iseqdacen ikemmusen RPM
----------------------------------------------------------------------

I tinaḍin n usebded n ukemmus utlayan (seld asebded n lqem n tutlayt Taglizit US n LibreOffice), Ɣaṛ ma ulac aɣilif, tigezmi daw agi yettusemman Sebded akemmus utlayan.

When you unpack the downloaded archive, you will see that the contents have been decompressed into a sub-directory. Open a file manager window, and change directory to the one starting with "LibreOffice_", followed by the version number and some platform information.

Akarm yegber akram nniḍen s yisem "DEBS".  Ddu ɣer ukaram "DEBS".

Sit s tqeffalt tayeffust deg ukaram sakin fren "Lditadiwent". Asfaylu n tdiwent ad-yeldi. Seg izirig n tladna n usfaylusekcem taladna yagi (Ak-d-yettusuter usekcem n wawal uffir inekl send aselkem n tladna) :

For Fedora-based systems: sudo dnf install *.rpm

I yinagrawen yebnan ɣef  Mandriva: sudo urpmi *.rpm

I yinagrawen nniḍen yebnan ɣef RPM (openSUSE, atg.): rpm -Uvh *.rpm

Akala n usebded yemmed akka tura, udiɣ ad tafeḍ tignitin n yesnasen akk n  LibreOffice ɣef wumuɣ Isnasen/Office n usufelaru yinek.

Ma ulac, tzemreḍ ad tesqedceḍ askript 'install' yellan deg ukaram yugaren aɣbar agi akken ad teselkmeḍ asebded am useqdac. Askript ad yeswel LibreOffice s umaɣnu yines deg usebded agi, yettwabrez seg umaɣnu  LibreOffice amagnu. Wali d akken ayagi ur yessebdad ara kra n iferdisen n unagram am iferdisen n wumuɣ n twennaṭ d ikalasen n tewsit MIME n twennaṭ.

Tamawt ɣef umsidef ɣer twennaṭ n tnarit i tussiwin Linux ur ḥuzant ara tinaḍin nnig-a
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Tzemreḍ ad tesbeddeḍ s wudem fessusen LibreOffice ɣef tussiwin nniḍen Linux ur ḥuzant ara tinaḍin n usebded. Timeẓri tagejdant anida yezmer ad yili wemgired d amsidef ɣer twennaṭ n tnarit.

The RPMS (or DEBS, respectively) directory also contains a package named libreoffice26.2-freedesktop-menus-26.2.0.1-1.noarch.rpm (or libreoffice26.2-debian-menus_26.2.0.1-1_all.deb, respectively, or similar). This is a package for all Linux distributions that support the Freedesktop.org specifications/recommendations (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Freedesktop.org), and is provided for installation on other Linux distributions not covered in the aforementioned instructions.

Asebded n ukemmus utlayan
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Sider akemmus utlayan n tutlayt n telɣubliṭ i tebɣiḍ. Ikemmusen llan deg anida anida yella weɣbaṛ n usebded agejdan. Seg umsefrak n ifuyla Nautilus, Suffeɣ-d aɣbaṛ i d-sidreḍ ɣer ukaram (amedya tanarit inek). Tebbet ma yella teffɣeḍ akk seg isnasen n LibreOffice (ula seg usenker arurad ma yella yermed).

Ddu ɣer ukaram anida id tesufruriḍ akemmus utlayan i d-sidreḍ.

Now change directory to the directory that was created during the extraction process. For instance, for the French language pack for a 32-bit Debian/Ubuntu-based system, the directory is named LibreOffice_, plus some version information, plus Linux_x86_langpack-deb_fr.

Tura ddu ɣer ukaram anida ig gebren ikemmusen ara tesbeddeḍ. Ɣef inagrawen yebnan ɣef Debian/Ubuntu, akaram d DEBS. ɣe inagrawen Fedora, openSUSE ɣeɣ Mandriva, akaram d RPMS.

Seg umsefrak n ifuyla Nautilus, Sit s tqeffalt tayeffust deg ukaram sakin fren taladna "Ldi di tdiwent". Deg usfaylu n tdiwent i d-ldiḍ yakan, selkem taladna akken ad tesbeddeḍ akemmus utlayan (s tludna yagi akka daw-a, ad yettusuter usekcem n wawal uffir n useqdac root):

I yinagrawen yebnan ɣef Debian/Ubuntu: sudo dpkg -i *.deb

For Fedora-based systems: su -c 'dnf install *.rpm'

I yinagrawen yebnan ɣef  Mandriva: sudo urpmi *.rpm

I  yinagrawen nniḍen yebnan ɣef RPM (openSUSE, atg.): rpm -Uvh *.rpm

Now start one of the LibreOffice applications - Writer, for instance. Go to the Tools menu and choose Options. In the Options dialog box, click on "Languages and Locales" and then click on "General". Dropdown the "User interface" list and select the language you just installed. If you want, do the same thing for the "Locale setting", the "Default currency", and the "Default languages for documents".

Ticki teslugneḍ iɣewwaren-agi, ssed ɣef Ih. Tankult n udiwenni ad temdel u ad twaliḍ izen n telɣut ara k-d-yinin belli ibeddilen-inek ur ttarmaden ara alam teffeɣeḍ u tsekkereḍ tikkelt-nniḍen LibreOffice (Ur tettu ara daɣen ad teffeɣeḍ seg usekker arurad ma yekker QuickStarter)

Tikelt nniḍen ara yekker LibreOffice, ad yekker deg tutlayt i tesbeddeḍ akka tura.

----------------------------------------------------------------------
Ugur di tnekra n useɣzan
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Difficulties starting LibreOffice (e.g. applications hang) as well as problems with the screen display are often caused by the graphics card driver. If these problems occur, please update your graphics card driver or try using the graphics driver delivered with your operating system.

----------------------------------------------------------------------
ALPS/Synaptics notebook touchpads in Windows
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Yella wugur akked unuḍaf n Windows, dɣa ihi ur tezmireḍ ara ad tsedrudmeḍ isemli LibreOffice mi ara tesḥluccegeḍ aḍad-ik ɣef ugdil s tnalit ALPS/Synaptics.

Iwakken ad tesremdeḍ adrudem deg ugdil s tnalit, rnu izirigen-agi deg ufaylu n twila "C:\Program Files\Synaptics\SynTP\SynTPEnh.ini" sakin sekker tikkelt-nniḍen aselkim-ik.

[LibreOffice]

FC = "SALFRAME"

SF = 0x10000000

SF |= 0x00004000

Amkan n ufaylu n twila yezmer ad imgirred si tuttuyt n Windows ɣer tayeḍ.

----------------------------------------------------------------------
Inegzumen
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Ala inegzumen kan n unasiw (tuddsa n tqaffalin) ur nettuseqdac ara ɣef unagraw n wammud zemren ad ttusqedcen ɣef LibreOffice. Ma yella tuddsa n tqeffalin di LibreOffice ur tetteddu ara ad tettwaglem s tallalt n LibreOffice, senqed anegzum agi n unasiw ma yella ur yettewaseqdec ara yakan deg unagraw n wammud. Akken ad tesseɣtiḍ tilla am tigi, tezemreḍ ad tesnifleḍ asukki n inegzumen n unasiwn unagraw n wammud. Tzemreḍ daɣen ad tesnifleḍ akk isukkiyen n tqeffalin di LibreOffice. I wugar n telɣut ɣef usentel agi, ddu ɣer tallalt n  LibreOffice neɣ ɣer tsemlit n n unagraw n wammud inek.

----------------------------------------------------------------------
Problems When Sending Documents as Emails From LibreOffice
----------------------------------------------------------------------

When sending a document via 'File - Send - Email Document' or 'File - Send - Email as PDF' problems might occur (program crashes or hangs). This is due to the Windows system file "Mapi" (Messaging Application Programming Interface) which causes problems in some file versions. Unfortunately, the problem cannot be narrowed down to a certain version number. For more information visit https://www.microsoft.com to search the Microsoft Knowledge Base for "mapi dll".

----------------------------------------------------------------------
Tamawt taxatart ɣet tettwaddef
----------------------------------------------------------------------

I wugar n yisallen ɣef tmahilin n tuffart n LibreOffice, rzu ar https://www.libreoffice.org/accessibility/

----------------------------------------------------------------------
Tallalt i iseqdacen
----------------------------------------------------------------------

The main support page offers various possibilities for help with LibreOffice. Your question may have already been answered - check the Community Forum at https://ask.libreoffice.org/ or search the archives of the 'users@libreoffice.org' mailing list at https://www.libreoffice.org/lists/users/. Alternatively, you can send in your questions to users@libreoffice.org. If you like to subscribe to the list (to get email responses), send an empty mail to: users+subscribe@libreoffice.org.

Wali daɣen aḥric n yisteqsiyen yezgan deg yismel n LibreOffice.

----------------------------------------------------------------------
Azen ineqqisen n wuguren & inezriyen
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Our system for reporting, tracking and solving bugs is currently Bugzilla, hosted at https://bugs.documentfoundation.org/. We encourage all users to feel entitled and welcome to report bugs that may arise on your particular platform. Energetic reporting of bugs is one of the most important contributions that the user community can make to the ongoing development and improvement of LibreOffice.

----------------------------------------------------------------------
Attekki
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Tamɣiwent LibreOffice ad d-tesfaydi aṭas ma tettekkiḍ deg usnefli n usenfar-agi axatar Open Source.

S yisem-ik d aseqdac, tettekkiḍ yakan deg usnefli n umseḍfer u nebɣa ad k-nsebɣes iwakken ad tettekkiḍ ugar s teɣzi n wakud di temɣiwent. Rnu-d ɣer-neɣ u rzu ɣer usebter n useqdac deg yismel n LibreOffice.

Amek ara tebduḍ
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Ttawil ifazen akk i uttekki, d altaɣ ɣer yiwet neɣ ugar gar tebdarin-neɣ n umeslay, ḍefṛ-itt kra n wakud, seqdec iɣbaṛen n yimaylen i wakken ad twulfeḍ ddeqs n yisental ibdan segmi d-teffeɣ tengalt taɣbalut n LibreOffice di Tubeṛ 2000. Mi twulfeḍ, azen imayl n usenked u tkecmeḍ ɣer terbaɛt. Ma twulfeḍ isenfaren Open Source, muqel ar tebdart n wayen i iḥwaǧ usenfar, ma yella kra ɣef wayen i tebɣiḍ ad tɛiwneḍ deg yismel n LibreOffice.

Multeɣ
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Atent-aya kra n tebdarin n yifurumen anida i tzemreḍ ad lteɣeḍ https://www.libreoffice.org/get-help/mailing-lists/

* Amayut: nnounce@documentfoundation.org *recommended to all users* (light traffic)
* Tabdart tamatut n iseqdacen: users@global.libreoffice.org *easy way to lurk on discussions* (heavy traffic)
* Asenfar Marketing: marketing@global.libreoffice.org *beyond development* (getting heavy)
* Tabdart tamatut n usnefli : libreoffice@lists.freedesktop.org (heavy traffic)

Ddu ɣer yiwen n usenfar neq ugar
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Tzemred ad muddeḍ afus deg usenfa r agi aɣbalu yeldin axatar ɣas akken ur tessined ara aṭas tardagt n iseɣẓanen neɣ taneflit.

Nessaram d akken ad tferḥ€ḍ s useqdec n LibreOffice 26.2 amaynut udiɣ ad tedduḍ ɣer-neɣ s srid.

Tarbaɛt LibreOffice

----------------------------------------------------------------------
Tangalt n uɣbalu yettuseqdacen/Yettusniflen
----------------------------------------------------------------------
